# Agent App

> v0.3 executable Agent App package standard for host runtimes.

## Core docs

- Specification: docs/en/specification.md
- What is Agent App: docs/en/what-is-agent-app.md
- App vs Skills and Knowledge: docs/en/agent-app-vs-skills-knowledge.md
- Quickstart: docs/en/authoring/quickstart.md
- Runtime package design: docs/en/authoring/runtime-package.md
- Capability SDK: docs/en/client-implementation/capability-sdk.md
- Host Bridge: docs/en/client-implementation/runtime-model.md#host-bridge-v1
- Reference CLI: docs/en/reference/reference-cli.md
- Content Factory example: docs/en/examples/content-factory.md

## Core boundary

Agent App composes UI, workflows, storage, workers, Skills, Knowledge bindings, Tools, Artifacts, Evals, permissions, overlays, and host capabilities into a complete installable intelligent app package. It does not replace Agent Skills or Agent Knowledge, and it does not run agents by itself. Hosts install apps, project entries into local catalogs, inject versioned Capability SDK handles, and execute through the host Agent Runtime.

## v0.3 current model

- Current entry kinds: page, panel, expert-chat, command, workflow, artifact, background-task, settings.
- Legacy entry kinds: scene and home are compatibility-only and invalid for manifestVersion 0.3.
- Reference example: 内容工厂 / content-factory-app.
- Host Bridge v1: `lime.agentApp.bridge` standardizes sandbox UI theme sync, host snapshots, navigation, toast, download, and capability invocation envelopes.
